title: Pesto Chicken Pasta Bake
description: A restaurant-worthy pasta bake with juicy seasoned chicken, roasted tomatoes, and fresh baby spinach in a luscious, creamy pesto sauce.

ingredients.item: pasta of choice (such as rigatoni or tortiglioni)
Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese, freshly grated and divided

instructions: Boil pasta in salted water until just shy of al dente; reserve 1 cup of cooking water before draining.
Toss chicken with 1 tbsp oil, Italian seasoning, paprika, 3/4 tsp salt, and black pepper. Sauté in a large oven-safe skillet over medium heat for 8 minutes until cooked, then set aside.
Sauté shallots in the same skillet for 3 minutes. Add garlic and red pepper flakes for 1 minute, then stir in roasted tomatoes and spinach until wilted. Season with remaining salt.
Stir in pesto and heavy cream. Add pasta and 1/2 cup reserved water, stirring until the sauce thickens and clings to the pasta.
Stir in the cooked chicken and 1/3 cup of the Parmigiano-Reggiano. Scatter mozzarella and remaining Parmigiano-Reggiano over the top.
Broil on high for 3-4 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly. Garnish with fresh basil and serve.
